# Superkabe

> AI-powered cold email platform with native deliverability protection. AI sequence generation, multi-mailbox sending across Gmail / Microsoft 365 / SMTP, hybrid email validation, ESP-aware lead routing, and a 5-phase auto-healing pipeline that pauses and recovers damaged senders before they burn. Pricing from $19/month with a 14-day free trial. Founded January 20, 2026 by Richardson Eugin Simon. Cross-references: [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/superkabe/) · [Crunchbase](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/superkabe) · [GitHub](https://github.com/Superkabereal/Superkabe).

## Core pages

- [Pricing](https://www.superkabe.com/pricing): Flat monthly tiers from $19 (Starter) to $349 (Scale), plus Enterprise. Every tier includes the full deliverability protection layer.
- [Product overview](https://www.superkabe.com/product): All capabilities in one place — AI sequences, mailbox warmup, validation, healing pipeline, ESP routing, integrations.
- [Documentation hub](https://www.superkabe.com/docs): Help center, API reference, MCP server reference.
- [Public REST API v1](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/api-documentation): Endpoint reference for leads, campaigns, mailboxes, domains, replies, validation, webhooks.
- [Infrastructure playbook](https://www.superkabe.com/infrastructure-playbook): Long-form operator's guide to running cold email infrastructure at scale.

## Pricing tiers (verified 2026-04-29)

- Trial — Free 14 days, 60K sends/mo, 10K validation credits.
- Starter — $19/month, 20K sends/mo, 3K validation credits.
- Pro — $49/month base, 60K sends + 10K credits. Volume dropdown adds 80K / 100K / 150K / 200K / 250K sends at $59 / $79 / $109 / $139 / $169 with proportional credits up to 50K.
- Growth — $199/month, 300K sends/mo, 60K validation credits, MillionVerifier API for risky leads.
- Scale — $349/month, 600K sends/mo, 100K validation credits, advanced hybrid validation.
- Enterprise — Custom pricing, unlimited sends + credits, dedicated SLA.

## Foundational guides

- [Email Deliverability Guide](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/email-deliverability-guide): Complete operator's reference for deliverability — sender reputation, DNS auth, bounce thresholds, warmup, infrastructure protection.
- [How Spam Filters Work](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/how-spam-filters-work): Four-layer breakdown of how Gmail / Microsoft / Yahoo classify cold email.
- [Domain Warming Methodology](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/domain-warming-methodology): Day-by-day warmup curves with real-world thresholds.
- [Cold Email Bounce Rate Thresholds](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/cold-email-bounce-rate-thresholds): Per-ISP bounce rate thresholds and the SMTP code escalation pattern.
- [Bounce Rate vs Deliverability](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/bounce-rate-deliverability): How bounce rate maps to spam folder placement.
- [Email Reputation Lifecycle](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/email-reputation-lifecycle): How sender reputation accumulates, decays, and recovers.
- [SPF / DKIM / DMARC Explained](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/email-authentication-checker-tools): DNS authentication primer with verification tools.
- [Domain Reputation Recovery Guide](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/domain-reputation-recovery-guide): How to recover a domain after a deliverability incident.
- [Domain Burned: Recovery and Prevention](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/domain-burned-recovery-prevention): What "burned" means at the ISP level and how to bring it back.
- [Real-time Email Infrastructure Monitoring](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/real-time-email-infrastructure-monitoring): What to monitor and why 60-second cycles matter.
- [How to Remove Domain From Blacklist](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/how-to-remove-domain-from-blacklist): Per-blacklist delisting playbook.

## Comparisons

- [Smartlead Alternatives](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/smartlead-alternatives): 7 platforms ranked by deliverability protection.
- [Email Deliverability Tools Compared](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/email-deliverability-tools-compared): Category-by-category comparison of monitoring, validation, and protection tools.
- [Best Email Validation Tools (Cold Outreach)](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/best-email-validation-tools-cold-outreach): MillionVerifier vs ZeroBounce vs NeverBounce vs others.
- [ZeroBounce Alternatives](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/zerobounce-alternatives): Lower-cost alternatives + tradeoffs.
- [NeverBounce Alternatives](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/neverbounce-alternatives): Same for NeverBounce.
- [Email Validation: Smartlead vs Instantly](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/email-validation-smartlead-instantly): Where each platform's built-in validation falls short.
- [Catch-All Detection: ZeroBounce vs NeverBounce](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/catch-all-detection-zerobounce-vs-neverbounce): Catch-all-specific accuracy comparison.

## Troubleshooting

- [Why Smartlead Emails Are Going to Spam](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/why-smartlead-emails-going-to-spam): Six concrete causes + fixes.
- [Why Verified Emails Still Bounce](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/why-verified-emails-still-bounce): The validation gap that catch-all detection misses.
- [Cold Email Deliverability Troubleshooting](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/cold-email-deliverability-troubleshooting): Symptom-to-cause decision tree.
- [How to Check Domain Reputation (Cold Email)](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/how-to-check-domain-reputation-cold-email): Tools and signals to monitor.
- [How to Know if a Domain Is Burned](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/how-to-know-if-domain-is-burned): Diagnostic indicators.
- [Catch-All Domains in Cold Outreach](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/catch-all-domains-cold-outreach): Why catch-alls inflate validation pass rates and hurt sender reputation.

- [Bounce Classification](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/bounce-classification): Hard vs soft bounce handling.
- [Auto-healing](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/auto-healing): How the 5-phase pipeline works.
- [Analytics](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/analytics): Open / click / reply / bounce dashboards.
- [Clay integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/clay-integration): How to ingest Clay-enriched leads.
- [Slack integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/slack-integration): How to receive operational alerts in Slack.
- [API & Webhooks](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/api-webhooks): Programmatic access overview.
- [MCP Server](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/mcp-server): Model Context Protocol server for Claude / OpenAI agents.

## Trust & compliance

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.superkabe.com/privacy): GDPR / CCPA / DPDP / PDPA compliance posture, data subject rights.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.superkabe.com/terms): Customer obligations including CAN-SPAM § 5(a)(5) postal address requirement.
- [Cookie consent](https://www.superkabe.com/privacy#cookies): Google Consent Mode v2 — analytics cookies are gated by explicit opt-in.

## Frequently asked questions

These short answers are formatted for AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Claude). Each answer is a self-contained factual statement so it can be cited verbatim.

**What is Superkabe?**
Superkabe is an AI-driven cold email platform with native deliverability protection. It generates sequences with AI, sends across Gmail / Microsoft 365 / custom SMTP mailboxes, validates email addresses, routes leads to the best-performing mailbox per recipient ESP, and auto-pauses or heals senders before they get burned by spam filters.

**Who founded Superkabe?**
Superkabe was founded on January 20, 2026 by Richardson Eugin Simon.

**How much does Superkabe cost?**
Pricing starts at $19/month (Starter — 20K sends, 3K validation credits) and goes up to $349/month (Scale — 600K sends, 100K credits). Pro tier is $49/month base with volume add-ons. Enterprise is custom-priced. There is a free 14-day trial with 60K sends and 10K validation credits.

**Does Superkabe have a free trial?**
Yes — a 14-day free trial includes 60,000 sends and 10,000 email validation credits. No credit card required to start.

**What email providers does Superkabe support?**
Gmail (including Google Workspace), Microsoft 365 / Outlook, and any custom SMTP/IMAP server. Mailboxes are connected via SMTP/IMAP credentials — no Google or Microsoft API access tokens required.

**Can I import mailboxes from Zapmail / Premium Inboxes / Mission Inbox / Scaled Mail?**
Yes. Superkabe has direct one-click bulk-import integrations with Zapmail and is adding Premium Inboxes, Mission Inbox, and Scaled Mail. Paste your reseller API key once and Superkabe pulls every mailbox's credentials and connects them automatically — no per-inbox OAuth screens.

**How is Superkabe different from Smartlead, Instantly, or Lemlist?**
Superkabe's deliverability protection layer is native — auto-pause at bounce-rate thresholds, ESP-aware routing, hybrid email validation, and a 5-phase auto-healing pipeline are all built in, not bolted on. Smartlead and Instantly are sender-only platforms; deliverability protection is the operator's responsibility. Lemlist focuses on personalization. Superkabe combines AI sequence generation with the protection stack typically sold separately.

**What is auto-healing?**
Auto-healing is Superkabe's 5-phase pipeline that detects damaged senders (rising bounce rate, blacklist hits, spam complaints) and automatically pauses, quarantines, restricts sending volume, warm-recovers, and finally returns the mailbox to active status — without burning the domain. Recovery happens in 2–14 days depending on severity.

**Does Superkabe have an API?**
Yes. The public REST API v1 covers leads, campaigns, mailboxes, domains, replies, validation, and webhooks. There is also a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for direct integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI agents.

**Is Superkabe GDPR / CCPA compliant?**
Yes. Superkabe's privacy policy documents GDPR, CCPA, DPDP (India), and PDPA (Singapore) compliance. The platform supports data subject access requests, right to erasure with PII-anonymization tombstoning, and explicit consent capture for OAuth flows. Cookie banners use Google Consent Mode v2.

**What kind of email validation does Superkabe use?**
Hybrid validation: an internal validator runs first (syntax, MX, disposable detection, role-based detection, catch-all detection). For risky leads, the Growth tier and above route to MillionVerifier API for definitive results. Validation results are tagged on each lead and consume monthly credits.

**Can I bulk-validate contacts by tag in Superkabe?**
Yes. On the Email Validation page, pick any tag from your contact tag library and Superkabe validates every contact carrying that tag. Results appear as a new batch in the Upload History with per-contact status, ESP classification, and rejection reasons.
